hooks.command: if [ "${DBT_TARGET}" = 'prod' ]; then echo 'ERROR: DBT_TARGET is set to prod. This is not allowed.' >&2; exit 2; fi; if [ "${DBT_PROJECT}" = 'DBT_PROJECT' ]; then echo 'ERROR: DBT_PROJECT is set to the placeholder value DBT_PROJECT. Check your .env configuration.' >&2; exit 2; fi
for f in $CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS; do [[ "$f" == *.sql ]] && sqlfluff lint "$f" 2>&1 | tail -20; done; true
for f in $CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS; do [[ "$f" == */models/*.sql ]] && dbt compile --select "$(basename "${f%.sql}")" 2>&1 | tail -20; done; true
